title: guettarda nashii
intro: Guettarda nashii, also known as the Hawaiian rose, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Guettarda nashii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Guettarda nashii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
